title: Immersive Aircraft: Create
description: Changes crafts for the "Immersive Aircraft" mod to ones more suitable for the "Create" mod
body: The datapack is written for personal use and convenience. Inspired by the datapack from nicky__21, but the original datapack has not been updated for a long time. There are many strange crafts or unchanged ones, but this is better than nothing. It is planned to make crafts more uniform. For work obviously necessary: ​​Create and Immersive Aircraft
